text.title: Claude API Integration Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract for the produced `ClaudeService` config: which surfaces are wired, default model, retry, stop_reason discipline, caching status.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)
section.code: { "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#", "type": "object", "title": "claude-api-integration-output", "required": [ "surfaces_wired", "default_model", "stop_reason_centralised", "retry_installed", "forbidden_seen" ], "properties": { "surfaces_wired": {"description": "Subset of {completion_sync, completion_async, streaming, tool_use, vision, extended_thinking, prompt_caching, batch_api}."}, "default_model": {"description": "Full-date pinned model id."}, "stop_reason_centralised": {"description": "Boolean — service layer validates stop_reason; subagents do not."}, "retry_installed": {"description": "Boolean — tenacity decorator covering 429+5xx+529 is active."}, "prompt_caching": {"description": "Object: cached_prefix_tokens (>=1024), hit_ratio_target."}, "extended_thinking": {"description": "Object: budget_tokens, max_tokens (>= budget + 4096); temperature absent."}, "forbidden_seen": {"description": "Forbidden patterns matched; must be empty."} } }

required.field: Forbidden patterns matched; must be empty.
Cache configuration if prompt_caching is in surfaces_wired.
Thinking configuration if extended_thinking is in surfaces_wired.

example.note: All forbidden patterns absent; cache prefix above floor.
Alias model, no centralisation, no retry — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
